#   good:  "FOUR SEASONS HOTEL"    bad: "FOUR SEASONS"  (-> Four Seasons Park)
# EDIT THIS FILE to add more. Lines starting with # are ignored.
# --- Football training grounds (aliases incl. the facility's exact postcode) ---

LONDON COLNEY;SOBHA REALTY TRAINING;ARSENAL TRAINING CENTRE;AL2 1BZ
